items.title: After wudu
items.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
items.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh.
items.translation: I bear witness that there is no god except Allah alone, with no partner or associate, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.
items.source: After wudu. IslamQA 125773; Dorar hadith JGruHdsq.

items.title: Entering the mosque
items.translation: O Allah, open to me the gates of Your mercy.
items.source: Entering the mosque. IslamQA 272194; Bin Baz audio 886.

items.title: Leaving the mosque
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty.
items.source: Leaving the mosque. IslamQA 272194; Bin Baz audio 886.

items.title: After the adhan
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba hadhihi-d-da'watit-tammah, was-salatil-qa'imah, ati Muhammadan al-wasilata wal-fadilah, wab'ath-hu maqaman mahmudan alladhi wa'adtah.
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the established prayer, grant Muhammad the wasilah and virtue, and raise him to the praised station that You promised him.
items.source: After the adhan. Bin Baz audio 886 quoting Sahih al-Bukhari.
